entry.title: Don’t act surprised when it barges in anyway
entry.summary:
Author: vanillameringuecookie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,068Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 71

Summary: Working under a pseudonym as a burglar was supposed to be the easy way out of your miserable life. But in a twisted turn, tangled up with stuff you shouldn’t have ever messed with, Red Hood finds you. That might be the worst thing that’s happened to you. follow my tumblr: vanillameringuecookie

entry.title: A Different Life With You
entry.summary:
Author: veena_the_aloo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,951Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 99

Summary: Jason doesn't wanna die. He really doesn't. He prays to whatever god that will listen to not let him die again.Whatever god did seem to be listening seemed to have given pity. Because when he wakes, he wakes up ten years older, in a house he doesn't recognize, married to a woman he doesn't know and with kids he's never seen. He's in another man's body. (Can be read as Reader or OC since FMC is never directly referred to by name or described)

entry.title: Even the Sun Cries Sometimes (Full Fic)
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,956Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 36

Summary: “You’re not smoking again are you?” You take a drag as you contemplate your reply, watching the smoke coil above you and float away. “It’s been a long day, Steph.” “Talk to me.” You shake your head despite her not being able to see it. “No, it’s alright. I just didn’t sleep well last night. Tired is all.” She hums as if she doesn’t believe you. “You don’t need me to tell you that smoking is bad for you.” You scoff. “If smoking was so bad, God wouldn’t have made tobacco. In fact, if he wants me to stop smoking, may he give me a sign right now, and I swear I will quit for good!” “You don’t even believe in-” *BANG!*, *CRASH!* *THUD!* OR: I wrote a hurt/comfort one shot between Jason Todd and the Reader, and then got inspo to turn it into a full fic. Thank you flamingoesareawesome

entry.title: The Gotham Promethus
entry.summary:
Author: up_tonogood

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,381Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 107

Summary: Frankenstein! Jason Todd, set in the 1800s. Dick Grayson sails into the Arctic, chasing whispers that his lost brother, Jason, may still walk the world of the living. You are a young artist, hired for an Arctic exhibition, who becomes entangled in the Waynes's web of grief, rebirth, and a bunch of angsty monologues.

entry.title: ✸ Under his heart with you ✸ - JASON TODD X G.N Reader (Under the redhood au)
entry.summary:
Author: Felileycom

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,805Chapters: 2/8Kudos: 15

Summary: He played two cruel jokes. One was your “death.” The other was his you remember that day too well, the way it burned into you, the way it never really ended. he died. Jason Todd. Maybe the only person you ever loved. that’s the story, isn’t it? the punchline everyone believes. That he died. but the real joke the crueler one was you. Pulled from icy waters by a creature that wasn't supposed to exist, you survive with more than just scars. A god lives in your ribs now. thank the joker, You leave Wayne Manor, your grief, and Bruce's moral code behind, building a new life in Gotham's shadows with only your jellyfish-"your children" for company. Two years later, a man in a red helmet intervenes during a hit. He fights like Jason. He stands like Jason. in a way...? JASON TODD X G.N Reader Content Warning: Major character death (Jason Todd), graphic violence, torture (referenced), drowning, asphyxiation, suicidal ideation, body horror, blood/gore, murder, revenge fantasies, parental grief, trauma responses, emotional breakdowns, consumption of humans (by creatures), dissociation.

entry.title: Do I Wanna Know?
entry.summary:
Author: chlo_caineandabel

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,390Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 23

Summary: At what point does a stranger become your friend? When you first talk to them? When you share your secrets with them? And when they drift away, do they once again become a stranger even while knowing your deepest secrets? You were siting alone in the park with seventeen minutes left till midnight. Seventeen minutes left of your birthday. A slightly stale cupcake you received from the bakery that closed ten minutes ago sits beside you on the bench. The moon rolls about in the sky as it slowly takes its place in the dark canvas of the sky. Out of the silence of the night, you hear someone's voice. "What brings you out here so late at night?"

entry.title: Penny Dreadful
entry.summary:
Author: jimcricket

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,090Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 36

Summary: barbara gordon has had countless good ideas in her life, as the smartest person she knows it's not too difficult to figure out exactly what people need and how to get them there. So, without much planning, she decides the thing her pregnant roommate needs is somebody to walk her home--and thankfully she has somebody in desperate need of a friend. OR how barbara gordon gives jason todd a family.

entry.title: Baby’s First Creature-Feature
entry.summary:
Author: TheGoldenPath

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 57,559Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 95

Summary: Excerpt~She’s reading to him, a generator manual that looks well read. The pages are yellow and water stained around her long fingers. His vision lazily trails from the book to his bloodied sheets and back to the stranger. Is he hallucinating a comforting presence to make his reality less burdensome? When had his visions ever been pleasant?A pretty girl to sit by his bedside and comfort him in his death. He tries to reach out and touch her hand, just to see if she’s a fantasy meant to remind him of everything he never fully had only for the pain to jolt up his entire abdomen. Summary~Jason awakes on an alternate earth whose only occupants is a secretive girl and a strange dog. He struggles to bring them home as a presence works in the shadows to control them. He learns the hard way that some secrets are best left alone. Dedicated to all the fawns that had to grow sharp teeth so they could defend themselves❤️
